partial_result: HN posted by Carlos (3 points after 22hrs, Ask HN format). IndieHackers still pending.

instructions.summary: Two one-click posts -- HackerNews and IndieHackers -- 10 min total
instructions.detail: Both have content ready. No accounts to create -- HN uses an existing account, IH just needs a free signup. Best time to post HN: weekday 9-11am US ET (2-4pm Lisbon) for max visibility.
instructions.exact_action:
1. HACKER NEWS (news.ycombinator.com/submit) -- log in, then:
   Title: Ask HN: Anyone dealing with Portugal's freelancer tax portal as a non-Portuguese speaker?

   Text:
   Portal das Financas -- Portugal's mandatory system for issuing freelancer receipts (recibos verdes) -- has no English version. No language switch, no English help text.

   For the 9,000+ D8 digital nomad visa holders freelancing in Portugal, one wrong dropdown silently opts you into a 23% VAT regime on income you have already spent. The portal does not warn you. Most find out from their accountant months later.

   We built VerdeDesk -- an English-language interface for the green receipt workflow: plain-English field explanations, income tracking vs the 15k EUR VAT threshold, quarterly Seguranca Social reminders.

   Landing page at verdedesk.vercel.app -- would love to hear from anyone who has dealt with this, and whether the framing matches the actual problem.

2. INDIEHACKERS (indiehackers.com) -- post in 'Share your project' or 'Looking for Feedback' group:
   Title: Building an English UI for Portugal's freelancer tax portal -- looking for feedback

   Body:
   Portugal's Portal das Financas is the only way to issue a recibo verde (freelancer receipt). It is entirely in Portuguese, no English version, and one wrong dropdown creates a VAT liability you did not collect.

   Building VerdeDesk -- English-first interface for the green receipt workflow, with income tracking and compliance reminders. Target: English-speaking freelancers on Portugal's D8 digital nomad visa.

   Currently at waitlist stage. Pricing hypothesis: 9 EUR/month vs 80-165 EUR/month for a local accountant.

   Would love brutal feedback on positioning or anything else.
   verdedesk.vercel.app
instructions.unblocks: Tech-savvy audience with high signal-to-noise -- both channels reach builders and indie founders who match our ICP
